title: Ricinocarpus blancoanus
taxonomy: Ricinocarpus blancoanus is a species of plant in the family Celastraceae. The classification of Ricinocarpus blancoanus places it within the kingdom Plantae. Further breaking down its classification, it falls under the subkingdom Angiospermophyta and the phylum Magnoliophyta. At the class level, it is classified as Magnoliopsida, and at the order level, it is placed in Celastrales. This classification structure indicates the plant's relationships with other species within the plant kingdom.
